name: get_documents
description: Retrieve documents from a Meilisearch index using pagination, field selection, and optional filtering. Unlike search, this returns documents without ranking. Useful for browsing indexed content, verifying data, or building list views.

parameters.name: indexUid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the index.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of documents to return (default 20).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to include. Use '*' for all fields.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression to retrieve a subset of documents (e.g. 'genres = action').
